---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a broken or unexpected behaviour
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Screen Recording
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 126]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Deployed version / branch: [e.g. main, feat/xxx]

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem here.
